body.docName: 采购付款预入库单查询
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-pay/core/pre-inventory/batch-query 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-pay/core/pre-inventory/batch-query 
 ## 接口描述 
用于采购付款-批量查询预入库单信息，
单次查询上限100条。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"inventoryCodeList","label":"%E9%A2%84%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","maxLength":"","desc":"%20%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87100%E6%9D%A1%EF%BC%9B%0A%E8%BE%93%E5%85%A5%E7%A9%BA%E5%88%99%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A9%BA%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%2220250909-1%22%5D%20%20"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"maxLength":"","label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9Atrue%EF%BC%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9Afalse"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%AE%8C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%22","desc":"%20%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%9A%E2%80%9D%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E2%80%9C%E3%80%82%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E3%80%82"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","required":true,"name":"returnCode","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22SUC0000%22","desc":"%20%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR1%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%9AEROOR2%0A%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%9ASUC0000%0A%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%EF%BC%9AE0002"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","required":false,"name":"body","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%9A%84%E9%A2%84%E5%85%A5%E5%BA%93%E5%8D%95%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"purchaseCompanyName","required":true,"maxLength":"100","label":"%E9%87%87%E8%B4%AD%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E6%B1%9F%E8%A5%BF%E5%A4%A7%E5%AD%A6%E9%99%84%E5% ## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | EROOR1| 系统错误| 稍后再试，或联系开发人员|
  | E0002| 查询预入库单数量不能超过100条|控制单次查询数量小于100|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-pay/core/pre-inventory/batch-query

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-pay/core/pre-inventory/batch-query

接口描述

用于采购付款-批量查询预入库单信息，
单次查询上限100条

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数
